metadata.title: Share Note
metadata.description: Instantly share a note, with the full theme and content exactly like you see in Reading View. Data is shared encrypted by default, and only you and the person you send it to have the key.

regex.source:
alog(
        "Delete shared note?",
        "Are you sure you want to delete this shared note and the shared link? This will not delete your local note.",
        async ()
regex.target:
alog(
        "删除已共享的笔记？",
        "你确定要删除这个共享笔记和共享链接吗？这不会删除你的本地笔记。",
        async ()

regex.source: .error("Zero number is not allowed", this.tokenStart - value.length)
name: "Force re-upload of all data for this note"
regex.target: name: "强制重新上传此笔记的所有数据"

regex.source: description: "Instantly share a note, with the full theme and content exactly like you see in Reading View. Data is shared encrypted by default, and only you and the person you send it to have the key."
regex.target: description: "可免费上传至第三方服务器（由note.sx提供服务）进行分享你的笔记，分享链接中的显示内容会和你阅读视图中看到的完全相同，默认情况下，笔记会以加密的形式进行分享，只有你和接收者拥有密钥（也可设置公开共享）。注意：如果是个人隐私或敏感信息，建议不要上传至第三方平台！"

regex.source: .setName(`\u2B50 Your shared note theme is "${this.plugin.settings.theme || "Obsidian default theme"}"`)
regex.target: .setName(`\u2B50 您的共享笔记主题是 "${this.plugin.settings.theme || "Obsidian 默认主题"}"`)

regex.source: .setName("Copy the link to clipboard after sharing")
regex.target: .setName("分享后将链接复制到剪贴板")
.setName("分享链接默认有效期（例如：15 minutes或3 hours或7 days或1 month，最小为 1 分钟）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Click the button to request a new API key")
.setDesc("The frontmatter property for storing the shared link and updated time. A value of `share` will create frontmatter fields of `share_link` and `share_updated`.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于存储共享链接和更新时间的Frontmatter属性。“share” 值将创建 “share_link” 和 “share_updated” 的字段。")

regex.source: .setDesc("To set a new theme, change the theme in Obsidian to your desired theme and then use the `Force re-upload all data` command. You can change your Obsidian theme after that without affecting the theme for your shared notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置新主题，请在 Obsidian 中将主题更改为您想要的主题，然后使用 “Force re-upload all data” 命令。此后您更改 Obsidian 主题不会影响您共享笔记的主题。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose the mode with which your files will be shared")
.setDesc("Set the title you want to use in a frontmatter property called `" + this.plugin.field(4 /* title */) + "`")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置您想要在Frontmatter 属性中使用的标题 `" + this.plugin.field(4 /* title */) + "`")

regex.source: .setDesc("The max width for the content of your shared note, accepts any CSS unit. Leave this value empty if you want to use the theme's width.")
regex.target: .setDesc("共享笔记的最大显示宽度，接受任何 CSS 单位。如果您想使用主题的宽度，请将此值留空。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove backlinks footer from the shared note")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除共享笔记中的页脚反向链接")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you turn this off, you can enable encryption for individual notes by adding a `share_encrypted` checkbox into a note and ticking it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果关闭此选项，您可以通过在笔记中添加“share_encrypted”复选框并勾选它来为单个笔记启用加密。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you want, your notes can auto-delete themselves after a period of time. You can set this as a default for all notes here, or you can set it on a per-note basis.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您需要，您的笔记可以在一段时间后自动删除。您可以在此处将其设置为所有笔记的默认设置，也可以针对每条笔记进行设置.")

regex.source: and the link is copied to your clipboard
regex.target: 链接会被复制到你的剪贴板
共享链接已复制到剪贴板

regex.source: There was an error uploading the note, please try again."
"If this message is showing, please do not change to another note as the current note data is still being parsed."
regex.target: "如果显示此消息，请不要切换到其他笔记，因为当前笔记数据仍在解析中。"

regex.source: "Failed to parse current note, check console for details"
regex.target: "无法解析当前笔记，请查看控制台了解详细信息"

regex.source: "There is no active file to share"
"Plugin successfully connected. You can now start sharing notes!"
regex.target: "插件已成功连接。您现在可以开始分享笔记了！"

regex.source: "There was an error uploading the note, please try again."
regex.target: "上传笔记时出现错误，请重试。"
